rows.label: qev025905_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmph... To think that mere tools known
as Earthlings would rebel against their
owner... Just who do you think you are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0002
rows.name:
You should just obey like Fraisie,
acting like the proper tools you are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's right, it's not too late even
now! Follow the words of my god, kill
the Ma-non, and bring chaos to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_SEL0011
rows.name: Deny the words of her god.

rows.label: qev025905_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for the true identity
of the avatar of God.

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0004
rows.name:
Foolish... I see, no wonder
even the Growth detest you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0005
rows.name:
I am... truly an avatar of god...
One of the great daughters who
realize the will of Mother Fortun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well... very well. I will make you regret
pointing your blade at Twin, the daughter
bestowed with the name of the Tower...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025905_MSG0007
rows.name:
Aah... Mother! Please watch
as I unleash all the slaughter
my power can muster...![ST:wait ]
